target: Language says kora-inspired prototype and avoids authenticity claims
action_if_fail: Revise language and get advisor/player review

target: Each critical dimension maps to workbook cell or marked assumption
measurement_method: manual audit of design.md and spreadsheet
action_if_fail: Add labels or companion cell map

target: All nylon strings below practical percent-break target or deliberately derated
measurement_method: Wolfram/string calculator using actual string data
action_if_fail: Reduce target tension or revise scale/pitch/material

target: Wound strings use measured unit weight or supplier data
measurement_method: measure mass per length or use manufacturer specs

action_if_fail: Recut sled stops and scrap test

target: Segmented bowl holds shape with no open glue lines
Neck/spine supports 1.5x planned total string load without cracking
action_if_fail: Increase neck section or redesign joint

target: Tail ring/bar holds 1.5x planned total string load
tolerance: no slip sharp edges or deformation

target: Bridge does not dent/tear head under staged load
action_if_fail: Increase foot area or pad material

target: Bridge remains stable under asymmetric pluck simulation
measurement_method: side load test at partial tension
action_if_fail: Widen foot or alter string bank geometry

target: Measured pitch is within rough tuning window after settling
measurement_method: strobe tuner at 68-74 F and recorded RH
phone mic or measurement mic sweeps

target: Player can hold posts and pluck both banks without wrist strain
tolerance: no pain and no blocked strings
action_if_fail: Move posts or bridge/string bank spacing

target: Generated or placeholder visuals are clearly labeled
action_if_fail: Replace with photos or explicit labels

target: string-break-risk.csv is updated from supplier or measured string data and all full-stringing blockers are cleared
measurement_method: CSV review plus supplier spec or measured mass-per-length evidence
action_if_fail: Revise pitch scale material or target tension and keep low-tension mule only
